bio.zh: Hi，欢迎来到我的作品集网站，我是**廖若凡**，北京大学计算机硕士研究生在读。本硕5年的时间里，我共计参与开发了软件网站10余个，拥有软件著作权3项。曾在**腾讯ieg图灵实验室 (Turing Lab) **任全栈算法工程师，参与云游戏的图像算法和自动化测试Agent开发，在广东联通产业互联网参与搭建百万级工业质检工作流，优化质检视觉算法。此外，我共参与创业项目两次，月流水最高达10w元。曾作为产品、设计、前端开发成员参与字节跳动举办的黑客松竞赛“AI创变者大赛”进入总决赛（全国前20）。
bio.en: Hi, welcome to my portfolio website. I'm **Liao Ruofan**, a master's student in computer science at Peking University. During my 5-year period of undergraduate and postgraduate studies, I have participated in the development of over 10 software websites and hold 3 software copyrights. I once worked as a full-stack algorithm engineer at **Tencent Turing Lab**, participating in the development of image algorithms and automated testing agents for cloud games. I also participated in the construction of a million-level industrial quality inspection workflow for Guangdong Unicom Industrial Internet, optimizing the quality inspection visual algorithms. Additionally, I have been involved in two entrepreneurial projects, with the highest monthly revenue reaching 10,000 yuan. I also served as a member of the product, design, and front-end development teams in the ByteDance hackathon competition "AI Innovators Challenge", reaching the finals (ranked among the top 20 nationwide).

bio.zh: 本网站是我在开源项目基础上通过vibe coding二次开发而来，为静态网站添加了后台管理系统并对前端进行修改优化。希望通过简单易懂的图形化界面，让每个没有代码基础的人也能快速部署自己的个人网站和作品集。
bio.en: This website was developed by me based on an open-source project through the second-level development by vibe coding. It adds a backend management system to the static website and modifies and optimizes the front end. I hope that through a simple and understandable graphical interface, everyone without a coding background can quickly deploy their own personal websites and portfolios.
